summary: Bug fix verification complete - Both reported bugs are FIXED. 1) SpotHub 'Spot not found' error resolved (was caused by base_session_rate AttributeError, fixed to use session_price). 2) is_shooting and is_live are now separate states - photographer can be shooting without automatically being live.
critical_code_review_comments: Added is_shooting field to ProfileResponse model in profiles.py - this was missing and needed for frontend badge display
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) SpotHub loads correctly with spot name, region, and tabs (Forecast, Pro Photos, Community). 2) Profile page shows 'Go Live' button when is_live=false, and 'SHOOTING' badge when is_shooting=true. The separation of is_shooting (professional work) and is_live (social broadcasting) is working correctly.

bug_1_spothub_error.description: SpotHub page now loads correctly without 'Spot not found' error
bug_1_spothub_error.evidence: Cocoa Beach Pier spot loads with name, region (Central Florida), and all tabs (Forecast, Pro Photos, Community)

bug_2_shooting_vs_live_separation.description: is_shooting and is_live are now separate states
bug_2_shooting_vs_live_separation.evidence: Profile shows 'SHOOTING' badge (is_shooting=true) while 'Go Live' button is visible (is_live=false)
